title: CSAF Extension Metadata
description: Representation of metadata for a CSAF Extension.

location_t.title: Location
location_t.description: Contains all necessary information for a single location.

max_occurrence.title: Maximum Occurrence
max_occurrence.description: Contains the number how often the extension can be present in this path.

$schema.title: CSAF Extension Metadata Schema
$schema.description: Contains the URL of the CSAF Extension Metadata JSON schema which the JSON object promises to be valid for.

extension_schema.title: Extension Schema
extension_schema.description: Holds the `$id` value of the CSAF Extension Schema this metadata applies to.

incompatible_extensions.title: List of Incompatible Extensions
incompatible_extensions.description: Contains a list of incompatible extensions.

items.title: Incompatible extension
items.description: Contains the `$id` value of a CSAF Extension Schema which is incompatible with this extension.

last_updated.title: Last updated
last_updated.description: Holds the date and time when the document was last updated.

requirement.title: Requirement
requirement.description: Contains the requirement for all possible paths.

$.document.x_extensions.title: Document extension path
$.document.x_extensions.description: Contains requirements for this extension on document path.

$.product_tree.branches..product.x_exten.title: Product Tree Branch extension path
$.product_tree.branches..product.x_exten.description: Contains requirements for this extension on the Product Tree Branch path.

$.product_tree.full_product_names[*].x_e.title: Product Tree Full Product Names extension path
$.product_tree.full_product_names[*].x_e.description: Contains requirements for this extension on the Product Tree Full Product Names path.

$.product_tree.relationships[*].full_pro.title: Product Tree Relationship extension path
$.product_tree.relationships[*].full_pro.description: Contains requirements for this extension on the Product Tree Relationships path.

$.vulnerabilities[*].metrics[*].content..title: Vulnerabilities Metrics extension path
$.vulnerabilities[*].metrics[*].content..description: Contains requirements for this extension on the Vulnerabilities Metrics path.

$.vulnerabilities[*].x_extensions.title: Vulnerabilities extension path
$.vulnerabilities[*].x_extensions.description: Contains requirements for this extension on the Vulnerabilities path.

$.x_extensions.title: Root extension path
$.x_extensions.description: Contains requirements for this extension on the root path.
